HF is Hank “hallzerk” Fender, a North American CS:GO player from Omaha, Nebraska. He is currently an AWPer for Complexity. He is known for ensuring his mullet is as strong as his CT-side. He chose to be an AWPer after his dad handed him a hunting rifle when he was seven.

@fl0m your thoughts on astralis now that device is back?

No, I don’t jerk off to fl0m because I’m gay, I jerk off to fl0m because he is what I will become with hard enough training. I can get out of nova. I can go to the gym. fl0m is not a human but instead an idea. The idea of my life working, the idea of my not getting bad teammates (who are always at fault in my games seriously wtf am I supposed to do) and the idea of me climbing. When I see fl0m I don’t get excited because I’m gay but because he is my future mirror.
